entities.name: PULSE CROPS
entities.description: Leguminous crops that are susceptible to insect pest damage

entities.name: INSECT PESTS
entities.description: Insects that cause considerable damage to pulse crops

entities.name: BROAD-SPECTRUM RESISTANCE
entities.description: Resistance against a wide range of insect pests

entities.name: CULTURAL PRACTICES
entities.description: Traditional farming methods used for the effective control of insect pests

entities.name: SYNTHETIC INSECTICIDES
entities.description: Chemical agents used for the effective control of insect pests

entities.name: HOST PLANT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The innate ability of a plant to resist insect infestation

entities.name: INSECT-RESISTANT TRANSGENIC CROPS
entities.description: Crops genetically modified to express resistance to insect pests

entities.name: INTEGRATED PEST MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A holistic approach to managing insect infestations in pulse crops

entities.name: SCREENING OF GENETIC RESOURCES
entities.description: The process of identifying insect resistance within genetic pools

entities.name: FERTILITY BARRIERS
entities.description: Biological obstacles that minimize the utilization of identified resistance in breeding

entities.name: LINKAGE DRAG
entities.description: The unwanted transfer of genes linked to a desired trait during breeding

entities.name: CROP BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Systematic efforts to improve pulse crops by incorporating resistance traits

entities.name: INSECTICIDAL PROTEINS
entities.description: Proteins derived from various sources that are toxic to insects

entities.name: BACILLUS THURINGIENSIS ENDOTOXIN
entities.description: An insecticidal protein produced by Bacillus thuringiensis

entities.name: PLANT PROTEASE INHIBITORS
entities.description: Proteins that inhibit protease enzymes in insects to provide resistance

entities.name: CHITINASES
entities.description: Enzymes that degrade chitin in insect exoskeletons

entities.name: ALPHA-AMYLASE INHIBITORS
entities.description: Proteins that inhibit amylase enzymes in insects

entities.name: SECONDARY METABOLITES
entities.description: Organic compounds used by plants for defense against insects

entities.name: VEGETATIVE INSECTICIDAL PROTEINS
entities.description: Proteins produced during the vegetative phase of B. thuringiensis

entities.name: GENE PYRAMIDING
entities.description: The practice of combining multiple resistance genes to delay resistance development

entities.name: TOXIN EXPRESSION
entities.description: The level of insecticidal toxin produced by a transgenic plant

entities.name: MOLECULAR STUDIES
entities.description: Detailed research exploring the genetic and molecular mechanisms of plant resistance

entities.name: GENETIC ENGINEERING
entities.description: The direct manipulation of an organism's genes to introduce insect resistance
